entities.baby: a baby crawling toward the stairs
entities.father: a father reading on the couch

scenes.title: The Living Room
scenes.background_prompt: A living room with an open staircase, a couch, a coffee table with a mug, a play mat with toys, and a baby gate that is open. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A living room in a family home. A baby of about ten months in a white onesie with blue stars crawls energetically across the hardwood floor, heading directly toward an open staircase. The baby gate at the top of the stairs stands open — someone forgot to close it. The baby is only a meter away from the first step, moving with determined speed. On the couch against the far wall, the father in a flannel shirt and jeans is deeply absorbed in reading a thick paperback novel, legs stretched out on the coffee table, a mug of coffee beside him. He does not see the baby. A colorful play mat with scattered toys — blocks, a rattle, a soft ball — lies in the center of the room where the baby was presumably playing moments ago. The scene is charged with quiet urgency.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place baby on the hardwood floor, crawling energetically toward the open staircase, about one meter from the first step. Place father on the couch (far wall), deeply absorbed in a thick paperback, legs on coffee table, not seeing the baby.
